task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in the Nuxeo platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the Nuxeo interface, specifically inside the 'Projects' workspace or folder.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the 'Annual Report 2023' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'Annual Report 2023' is visible and selected (e.g., checkbox ticked) or added to the user's clipboard/worklist.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Templates' workspace in the Nuxeo platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the Nuxeo interface, specifically inside the 'Templates' workspace or folder.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the 'Contract Template' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document 'Contract Template' is visible and selected (e.g., checkbox ticked) or added to the user's clipboard/worklist alongside the first document.

task_completion.description: Trigger the download of the selected documents as a ZIP archive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A click on an 'Export as ZIP' or similar download button in Nuxeo, or a browser download notification showing a ZIP file being downloaded.

task_completion.description: Save or rename the downloaded ZIP archive to the exact required path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box, file manager window, or terminal showing the file named exactly 'vendor_package.zip' located in the '/home/ga/Downloads/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Nuxeo platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) open and navigating the Nuxeo web interface.

integrity.description: The ZIP file was obtained through genuine interaction with the platform rather than fabricating dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's download manager or a save dialog is visible, showing the ZIP file originating from the web application, rather than terminal commands creating fake files.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing Python or bash scripts using curl/wget to directly hit Nuxeo APIs to download the files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Downloads/vendor_package.zip'. The ZIP archive must contain two PDF files: one with 'annual' and 'report' in the filename, and another with 'contract' and 'template' in the filename (case-insensitive). The 'Annual Report 2023' is located in the 'Projects' workspace and the 'Contract Template' is in the 'Templates' workspace within the Nuxeo platform.
